title: Founder OS HQ - Reports
description: Consolidated reports database merging P09 Report Generator business reports and P25 Time Savings Calculator ROI reports.

Total Hours Saved.description: P25: Total hours saved by automation

Dollar Value.description: P25: Dollar value of time saved

Tasks Automated.description: P25: Number of automated tasks counted

Active Plugins.description: P25: Number of active plugins detected

notes: P09 writes Type='Business Report', P25 writes Type='ROI Report'. P16 Expense Report Builder also writes here with Type='Expense Report' (note: P16's expense REPORT output is a report document, distinct from the Finance DB invoice/expense records). Idempotent by Title + same calendar day. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Reports' first, then fall back to plugin-specific names.
